---
title: 'Maryan Louise King (1924–2012)'
date: '2025-01-05T04:17:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe Family Tree'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5935544909074495370'
blogger_filename: '/2025/01/maryan-louise-king-19242012.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe Family Tree/feed.atom'
---

<p>Maryan Louise King (06/26/1924–04/08/2012)&nbsp;&nbsp;</p><p><br /></p><p>Maryan was born June 26, 1924 in Missouri.&nbsp;</p><p>Married Don 5 Jun 1949 • Jackson, Missouri, USA</p><p><br /></p><p>Birth of daughter Linda Sue Wolfe (1952–)</p><p>01/19/1952</p><p><br /></p><p>1954</p><p>Age29</p><p>Birth of son Michael (Mike) Craig Wolfe (1954–)</p><p>05/14/1954</p><p><br /></p><p>1954</p><p>Age30</p><p>Select fact</p><p>Residence</p><p>1954</p><p><br /></p><p>1997</p><p>Age72</p><p>Death of mother Mary MayBelle King (1901–1997)</p><p>24 January 1997</p><p><br /></p><p>Death 8 APRIL 2012</p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p>Death of mother Maryan Louise King (1924–2012)&nbsp;</p><p>8 April 2012</p>
